# `.github/ISSUE_TEMPLATE/`

**Role:** **Issue forms** (YAML) for bug reports, features, documentation, model behavior, plus **template chooser** config.

**Cluster:** One template type per file upstream; together they standardize triage fields for the public issue tracker.

**Upstream:** [`../../../claude-code/.github/ISSUE_TEMPLATE/`](../../../claude-code/.github/ISSUE_TEMPLATE/)

**Neighbors:** [`.github overview`](../MACRO.md).
